name: Gingerbread from American Heart Association
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the first 7 ingredients and stir in the boiling water.
2. Mix in the unsifted flour. Dissolve the baking soda in 2 tbsp of hot water; add to batter.
3. Pour into a greased 8x8x2 inches cake pan. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
